NEW FAMILY? START HERE

Stop Working Without a Contract.
You Deserve Legal Protection.

Most caregivers work without a written agreement — leaving them unprotected if something goes wrong. NannyTrack generates a professional employment contract in minutes.

✓
Work schedule, hours and overtime rules
✓
Hourly rate, paid holidays and sick days
✓
Job responsibilities and duties
✓
Notice period and termination terms
✓
Emergency procedures and confidentiality
✓
Signed by both caregiver and employer

The app

See it in action

Simple, clean and built for your phone

Start shift with one tap
Generate invoice in seconds
Manage your full schedule

Built-in calendar

Your Schedule, Under Control

A full personal calendar built right into the app

📅
Personal events & reminders
Add doctor appointments, training courses, family meetings and personal reminders — all in one place.
🇺🇸
US holidays already marked
All federal holidays (Independence Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas) and observance days (Valentine's, Mother's Day) are pre-marked on the calendar so you never miss them.
🔄
Weekly work schedule
Set your recurring weekly schedule per family. The app shows your work days on the calendar automatically.
🔔
Event reminders
Get notified 15 min, 1 hour or 1 day before any event. Never forget an important appointment.

Tax season

Ready for Tax Season

Know exactly how much you earned — anytime, anywhere

NannyTrack keeps a complete record of all your earnings throughout the year. Whether you need to file taxes, apply for a loan or just want to know your annual income — it's all there.

earnings summary

Getting started

How it works

3 simple steps to get started

1
Add your family
Enter rate, state and work schedule. Create your employment contract in 5 minutes.
2
Track your hours
Start and stop the timer with one tap. Overtime calculated automatically for your state.
3
Get paid correctly
Generate your invoice, share with the family and track every payment received.

Full feature list

Everything included

50+ features, one price

⏱️
Real-time timer
Keeps running even when you close the app. Pause and resume anytime.
📋
Log full weeks at once
Forgot to log? Add an entire week of shifts in one go with expenses per day.
🧾
Expense tracking with receipts
Save receipt photos for each expense. Access them anytime if the family requests proof.
📊
Financial dashboard
6-month earnings chart, monthly goals and income breakdown by family.
🔔
Smart notifications
Overtime alerts, payment reminders and upcoming schedule events.
🌎
3 languages
English, Portuguese and Spanish. Switch anytime without losing data.
